stories.title: The Spurs bounce back in Game 3! Biggest takeaways...
stories.summary: NBA insiders break down Game 3 of the NBA Finals and look ahead to the rest of the Knicks-Spurs showdown.

stories.title: Brown on FT gap: 'Never thought I'd see' in Finals...
stories.summary: Knicks coach Mike Brown criticized the officiating in Game 3 of the NBA Finals after the Spurs shot 24 free throws in the second half to New York's eight.

stories.title: Spurs stun Knicks in MSG to revive Finals hopes
stories.summary: Victor Wembanyama had 32 points, eight rebounds and six assists in his first NBA Finals win Monday night as the Spurs returned to their "brand of basketball" to cut the Knicks' series lead to 2-1.

stories.title: 'Sad day': Coaches, ADs stunned by Sorsby ruling
stories.summary: A judge's decision to rule Texas Tech's Brendan Sorsby eligible Monday drew the ire of college coaches and athletic directors, with reactions ranging from doomsday predictions to informal talk about Big 12 schools attempting to not play the Red Raiders.

stories.title: Teen Russell, with Tiger's son on bag, makes Open
stories.summary: Teen Miles Russell, with Charlie Woods on his bag, was among those who endured "Golf's Longest Day" and qualified for next week's U.S. Open.
